documents.summary: Certificate of Incorporation for M/s ABC Pvt. Ltd. with PAN, CIN, and date of incorporation.
Audited balance sheet and financial statements for FY 2023-24 showing turnover and profit.
Work order for highway construction project from NHAI with contract value and dates.
GST registration certificate showing GSTIN and tax details.
